Dragged ORD-030 from Submitted to Approved. Column counts updated immediately — Submitted 1→0, Approved 10→11 — confirming optimistic UI update before API response.
Rollback on API failure — skipped per test plan (requires API failure simulation not reliably testable in this environment).
